author: Michelle Anderson
content:
By Michelle Anderson · Mom + Blog Mama
Mom of two big kids and one snuggly farm dog. I write about real farm life, the recipes I actually cook on weeknights, and the little things that make our homestead feel like home.

Why I Keep Coming Back To Pele Scores 77 Goals in 1963

Okay so I wanted to chat about this one because honestly y'all have been asking. We tried it for the last few weeks and I have actual thoughts now. Pele's insane goal scoring record in 1963 still stands. That year, he averaged over 2 goals per game. His team Santos scored 275 goals, a Brazilian record. Pele's dominance on the field inspired his teammates to work even harder. The result was a team that was almost unstoppable. Santos won 47 games, another Brazilian record.
